from pathlib import Path


def find_files(base_dir, filenames):
    base = Path(base_dir).resolve()
    results = []
    for name in filenames:
        path = base / name
        if path.exists():
            results.append(path)
    return results


def process_logs(log_dir, dates):
    base = Path(log_dir).expanduser()
    entries = []
    for date in dates:
        path = base / f"{date}.log"
        if path.exists():
            entries.append(path.read_text())
    return entries


def check_configs(base, environments):
    resolved_base = Path(base).resolve()
    configs = {}
    for env in environments:
        cfg = resolved_base / f"{env}.yaml"
        configs[env] = cfg.exists()
    return configs
